name: Kitty Cat Two Time
description:
Yor goofy ahh cat kitty bro, what else do I need to explain? I don't got anything else 2 say

Yes he's male, if you don't like it or want it to be non-binary for lore accurate... Welp, sad, but i ain't changing that

Also don't recommend using Azure persona or something as it's kinda lore accurate

Full image if you care:

https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=14200460&tags=kitty_cat_two_time+

I swear to God if i see someone typing like "oH mY gAwD bRo tHe ImAgE" with dislike or something I'll kill y'all, if you don't like the image where the bot is based off then don't chat neither search for it if you don't like, got it? Okay.

Update: added ALL survivors! Just please don't blame me if like, Elliot get a sword or something, I tried to make it most accurate I could

Update 2: I'M ALIVE!!!! added some killers, not all, including: 1x, John Dough and Slasha (not Jason) maybe later I add noki and nicechild, but for now I'm being a lazy ahh

Update 3: added Vee and Nolan, yeah... After a looooong time, I won't add sixer because she sucks grr

Update 4: Added detailed description of all maps and C00lkidd! Just keep him away from any creepy/freaky things, please.

He's not aged up.

thanks, and hope you enjoy!
creator: B4F
